name: Catabolyst
description: Splatter enemies with a short-range stream of corrosive bile and then toss the ammo bladder as a grenade when reloading. The emptier the pistol’s ammo bladder, the more potent its damage. A fully empty bladder packs the biggest punch.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Splatter enemies with a short-range stream of corrosive bile and then toss the ammo bladder as a grenade when reloading. The emptier the pistol’s ammo bladder, the more potent its damage. A fully empty bladder packs the biggest punch.

components.name: Mutagen Mass
components.description:
This living mass can produce weaponized toxins for weaponry.

Location: Clan Research (Bio Lab in the Dojo) and Infested Outbreak Invasion Rewards

components.name: Ocular Stem-Root
components.description:
The organs that once served as eyes, prior to Infestation, are still replete with useful components.

Source: Cut from Flagellocanth fish via Daughter in the Necralisk (Deimos). Catch Flagellocanth in Cambion Drift surface hotspots using Processed Fass Residue during Fass and Vome. Also drops from Isolation Vault Bounties in the Cambion Drift.

components.name: Scintillant
components.description:
These scarce, hovering relics of the Orokin era can still be found monitoring the isolation vaults deep beneath the surface of Deimos.

Location: Cambion Drift on Deimos

components.name: Stellated Necrathene
components.description:
A prismatic refinement of raw Necrathene, highly sought after.

Blueprint sold by Otak in the Necralisk on Deimos.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Catabolyst not showing a TRIGGER TYPE in Arsenal stats.

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Hotfix 29.5.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed Pulmonars, Proboscis Cernos and Catabolyst from Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes:
*Acquire the Blueprint for the Catabolyst from Bio Lab Research in the Dojo!
New weapons have emerged from the seething horror of the Infestation, each bringing a fresh, living aspect to their power. Featuring the bile-loaded Catabolyst Pistol, Proboscis Cernos Bow, Pulmonars Nunchaku, and the devastating Bubonico arm cannon.
Catabolyst
